title: astragalus citrinus
intro: Astragalus citrinus, also known as the desert horsebean, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help to balance the body's response to stress and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Astragalus citrinus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Astragalus citrinus is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
